---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug to help improve the app
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See the error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include any console errors.

## Environment

- **Browser and version:** (e.g. Chrome 131, Safari 17.4)
- **Operating system:** (e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14.5, iOS 17, Android 14)
- **Form factor:** Mobile / Desktop / Tablet
- **App version:** (see the latest entry in [CHANGELOG.md](../../CHANGELOG.md))
- **Installed as PWA?** Yes / No
- **Online or offline when it happened?** Online / Offline

## Screenshots or recordings

If applicable, attach screenshots or a short screen recording to help illustrate the problem.

## Additional context

Selected language, explanation style, framework, and backend (these affect which content is rendered). Anything else that might be relevant: browser extensions, custom DNS, network conditions, etc.
